entries: **The AI tool updates bulletin now ships in five languages**: each bulletin item previously carried only Traditional Chinese and English, so Simplified Chinese, Japanese, and Korean readers fell back to English; every item now includes zh-CN/ja/ko translations that keep each technical term's plain-language gloss and everyday metaphor in the reader's own language. The bulletin content was also refreshed to Claude Code 2.1.187, Codex 0.142.0, and Antigravity 1.0.11.
